services.construction_desc: Interior renovations, French drains, foundation crack repair, basement waterproofing, and structural work.
services.hardscape_desc: Pavers, retaining walls, irrigation systems, lawn care, and full outdoor living design.
services.maintenance_desc: Seasonal grass cutting plans, snow removal, power washing, and ongoing property upkeep.

hero.label: Our Story
hero.title: From Cleaning to Complete Property Care
hero.subtitle: Starting in 2014 as a commercial cleaning service, Aménagement Monzon has evolved into your complete property partner—landscape, hardscape, construction, and maintenance all in one trusted team.

founder.label: Meet the Founder
founder.bio_1: Silvio L. Monzon carries the values of his Mexican roots and humble hardworking background into everything Aménagement Monzon does. In 2014, with big dreams and determination, he founded the company starting with commercial cleaning services. Through grit, dedication, and an unwavering commitment to excellence, Silvio scaled the business into landscape, hardscape, and construction services. His vision has become the company's mission: to be the trusted partner owners call for every aspect of their property management, from routine maintenance to complete transformations.
founder.bio_2: "I came from humble beginnings, and that shaped who I am and how I run this company. Every client deserves the same respect, quality, and attention I would give to my own family's property. My dream is to build something that lasts—for our team, our clients, and our community. That drives me every single day."

quality.title: Quality First
quality.desc: We never compromise on materials or craftsmanship. Every project receives our full attention to detail.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.desc: Honest pricing, transparent communication, and keeping our promises are at the core of how we work.

family.title: Family Values
family.desc: As a family business, we treat every client and team member like extended family.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.desc: We prioritize eco-friendly practices and materials to protect our environment for future generations.

services.label: What We Do
services.title: Three Divisions, One Standard of Excellence
